params.debtTokenAmt: Amount of underlying token want to get

params.debt: The amount of debt, unit by underlying token
The amount of debt, unit by underlying token

params.callbackData: The data of flash loan callback
params.xtAmt: The amount of XT token.              The caller will receive an equal amount of underlying token by flash loan.

params.debtTokenAmt: Amount of underlying token want to lock

params.ftAmount: The amount of FT want to redeem
The amount of FT want to redeem
params.recipient: Who will receive the underlying tokens

returns.ft: Fixed-rate Token(bond token). Earning Fixed Income with High Certainty
returns.xt: Intermediary Token for Collateralization and Leveragin

burn(address,uint256).notice: Burn FT and XT to get underlying token.         No price slippage or handling fees.

initialize((address,address,address,addr.notice: Initialize the token and configuration of the market

issueFt(address,uint128,bytes).notice: Using collateral to issue FT tokens.         Caller will get FT(bond) tokens equal to the debt amount subtract issue fee

leverageByXt(address,uint128,bytes).notice: Flash loan underlying token for leverage

mint(address,uint256).notice: Mint FT and XT tokens by underlying token.         No price slippage or handling fees.

previewRedeem(uint256).notice: Preview the redeem amount and delivery data

tokens().notice: Return the tokens in TermMax Market
